result:
Build is clean (make exits 0, only pre-existing unrelated warning in `wpa_cli.c`). Summary of changes:

- `src/utils/os.h`: `os_get_time` now takes `(struct os_time *t, int clock_source)`.
- `src/utils/os_unix.c`: definition updated to accept and ignore `clock_source` (behavior unchanged).
- `src/utils/os_win32.c`, `src/utils/os_none.c`, `src/utils/os_internal.c`: matching definitions updated for signature consistency (not compiled in this build, but kept in sync with the header).
- All 34 call sites across `wpa_supplicant/` and `src/` updated to pass `0` as the new argument.

`wpa_supplicant` builds fully (`make` → exit 0, `wpa_supplicant`/`wpa_cli`/`wpa_passphrase` linked successfully).
